prompt:
LAYOUT REGENERATION — reference image 1 is the LAYOUT ANCHOR. Reproduce reference 1 pixel-faithfully: same Vice City night background with palms and city skyline and red neon glow, same MM gold/cream monogram logo if present, same "HOW TO ENTER THE MUHA MEMBERS / GIVEAWAY · Vice City" headline (cream letterpress headline + handwritten "Vice City" script), same star ornaments, same red Dodge Challenger photo and lighting, same gold "$25,000 CASH PRIZE + ALL-NEW DODGE CHALLENGER" panel, same QR code + "Scan To Find Out!" callout, same step-number circles and step-caption gold/cream text above each phone (1 "GO TO MORE AND TAP 'GIVEAWAYS'", 2 "SELECT 'GTA GIVEAWAY'", 3 "TAP 'SCAN GIVEAWAY TICKET'"), same styled disclaimer at the bottom, same aspect ratio, same composition, same arrangement of the three iPhone mock-ups, same Grand Theft Auto Vice City logo placement.

PHONE-SCREEN REPLACEMENT — fill each iPhone's display area with the corresponding clean UI mock-up. Every menu row, every status-bar character, every prize-row label, every row title and subtitle must be CRYSTAL CLEAR — no blur, no compression artifacts, no doubled letters, no ghost text, no warped typography.

REFERENCE 2 — MM MONOGRAM: render the MM gold/cream monogram logo at the top of the layout PIXEL-FAITHFUL to reference 2 — same exact wordmark, same decorative crown-flourish detail, same proportions, same color. The MM logo placement matches reference 1 (top of the canvas, horizontally centered). Do NOT improvise or substitute a different monogram — use reference 2 exactly.

PHONE-TO-REFERENCE MAPPING:
- Phone 1 (above step caption "1"): fill its display with reference 3 — the side-menu screen with the ACCOUNT header. Use the EXACT same UI from reference 3.
- Phone 2 (above step caption "2"): fill its display with reference 4 — the GIVEAWAYS top-bar header screen with "GTA Giveaway" card. Use the EXACT same UI from reference 4.
- Phone 3 (above step caption "3"): fill its display with reference 5 — the prize-list + EARN ENTRIES screen. Use the EXACT same UI from reference 5.

NEW ELEMENT — ADD THE RAFFLE TICKET (reference 6):

Include the GTA Muha raffle TICKET from reference 6 as an integrated design element placed in available empty space within the composition (not overlapping any existing element). Render the ticket PIXEL-FAITHFUL to reference 6 — red Challenger photo on the left half showing "CASH PRIZE $25,000 & ALL NEW DODGE CHALLENGER", encrypted ticket / QR scanner area on the right showing "Your Encrypted Raffle Entry Ticket. Scan In Members App To Redeem 10 Entries! No Purchase Necessary". Tilt the ticket slightly (~5-10°) for dynamism. Size it to fit cleanly in available empty space (roughly 30-40% of canvas width). Suggested placement: in the lower-center area between the QR code and the GTA Vice City logo, OR in the empty negative space between the $25,000 panel and the numbered steps column — whichever fits without overlapping any existing element. The ticket sits naturally on the dark Vice City background — NO white box, NO bright panel behind it, NO floating cutout look — its own edges land directly on the dark backdrop with a subtle warm-red rim glow grounding it.

KEEP IDENTICAL TO REFERENCE 1:
- iPhone device chrome (frame, screen rounded corners, notch, side buttons) for all three phones
- Size, position, tilt/perspective, and drop-shadow of each iPhone in the layout
- The Vice City background, headlines, MM logo, Challenger, gold panel, QR, step captions, disclaimer, and GTA Vice City logo
- The 4:5 portrait aspect ratio

TEXT-CLARITY MANDATE: every piece of text inside each iPhone screen must be at maximum sharpness — the viewer must be able to read every label without any blur or compression. The small in-screen typography MUST be crisp. The text on the raffle ticket ("CASH PRIZE", "$25,000", "ALL NEW DODGE CHALLENGER", "Your Encrypted Raffle Entry Ticket", "Scan In Members App To Redeem 10 Entries!", "WITH SCAN", "No Purchase Necessary") must also be sharp and readable.

NEGATIVE: do NOT change the Vice City background, MM logo, main headline, Challenger photo, QR code, step captions, GTA Vice City logo, or styled disclaimer; do NOT shift the phones' positions or change the iPhone frames; do NOT leave the word "raffle" / "raffles" visible in the in-app text — use "giveaway" / "GIVEAWAYS"; the new raffle ticket is the ONLY place "Raffle Entry Ticket" wording appears; no blur on phone-screen text; no compression artifacts; no doubled letters; no warped type; no white box behind the ticket; no overlap of the ticket with any existing element.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Assets/scan prod giveaway v2.png
